items.jp: よやく して います
items.note: Your opening line at the desk. Have the booking name ready.
o-namae when asking someone else's; namae for your own.

items.jp: スミスで よやく して います
こんばん とまります
items.note: For a walk-in without a booking. Add a night count if you can.

items.jp: チェックアウトは なんじですか
items.note: Usually 10 or 11am. Ask so you don't get a polite phone call.
The reception, from 'front'. 'furonto de' = 'at the desk'.

items.jp: にもつを あずかって もらえますか
items.note: Before check-in or after check-out. Almost always a yes.

items.jp: かぎを おねがいします
items.note: Leave it at the desk when you go out at many ryokan.
You give it to charge meals to the room; keep the card handy.
'wasuremono desu' = 'I left something behind'. Handy the morning after.

items.jp: ワイファイの パスワードは なんですか
items.romaji: waifai no pasuwādo wa nan desu ka
items.note: Often printed on a card in the room; ask if you can't spot it.
Ryokan breakfast is a whole spread — don't skip it.

items.jp: あさごはんは なんじですか
items.note: Often a fixed window. Unit 9 makes the answer readable.
Wash and rinse fully at the taps first; soak clean, towel out of the water.
Left side over right (right-over-left is for funerals). Wear it to dinner.
Signs split by colour: red/onna (women), blue/otoko (men).
The small one is for washing and modesty; leave the big one in the room.
Swap street shoes for these at the entrance; separate ones for the toilet.

dialogues.scene: A wooden ryokan entrance in the mountains. You slip off your shoes; the okami-san bows behind the desk as you arrive early, bags in hand.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: いらっしゃいませ。おなまえを おねがいします。

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Tell her you've booked so she can find you.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい、うけたまわって おります。おへやは にかいです。
turns.romaji: hai, uketamawatte orimasu. o-heya wa nikai desu.
turns.en: yes, we have you. your room is upstairs.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Check-in isn't till 3pm. Ask if she'll mind your bags till then.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: もちろんです。おふろは ごご よじからです。
turns.romaji: mochiron desu. o-furo wa gogo yo-ji kara desu.
turns.en: of course. the bath opens from 4pm.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You want to plan the morning. Ask what time breakfast is.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: あさごはんは しちじから はちじです。
turns.romaji: asagohan wa shichi-ji kara hachi-ji desu.
turns.en: breakfast is from seven to eight.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You need to message home. Ask for the wifi password.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: こちらの カードに かいて あります。
turns.romaji: kochira no kādo ni kaite arimasu.
turns.en: it's written on this card here.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: She's been lovely. Thank her before you head up.
